channel.title: Secret Societies on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Secret Societies on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Jim Marrs
item.description:
Jim Marrs was an American journalist and author known for his work on alleged cover-ups and conspiracies. His 1989 book, Crossfire, which explored JFK assassination conspiracy theories, was a source for Oliver Stone’s film JFK. Marrs also wrote books addressing government conspiracies related to aliens, 9/11, and secret societies. He taught a class on the JFK assassination at the University of Texas at Arlington for 30 years and passed away in 2017 at the age of 73.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jim_Marrs
